mapper.update: UPDATE public."SoilDatas" s SET "Classification" = r."Classification" FROM public."SoilClassificationRules" r WHERE s."SoilAttribute" = r."SoilAttribute" AND s."Value" >= r."MinValue" AND s."Value" < r."MaxValue" AND s."SoilAttribute" = #{soilAttribute}::soil_parameters;
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO public."SoilDatas" ( "MonitoringPointID", "SoilAttribute", "Value", "SamplingDate", "IsDelete", "Classification", "OvenNumber", "Notes", "FarmerName", "SoilSamplingTime" ) SELECT #{monitoringPointID}, #{soilAttribute}::soil_parameters, #{value}, #{samplingDate}, false, r."Classification", #{ovenNumber},
#{notes}, #{farmerName}, #{soilSamplingTime} FROM public."SoilClassificationRules" r WHERE r."SoilAttribute" = #{soilAttribute}::soil_parameters AND #{value} >= r."MinValue" AND #{value} < r."MaxValue" LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE public."SoilDatas" SET "IsDelete" = true, "DeletedAt" = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE "SoilDataID" = #{soilDataID}
UPDATE public."SoilDatas" SET "IsDelete" = false, "DeletedAt" = NULL WHERE "SoilDataID" = #{soilDataID}

UPDATE public."SoilDatas" s SET "MonitoringPointID" = #{monitoringPointID}, "SoilAttribute" = #{soilAttribute}::soil_parameters, "Value" = #{value}, "SamplingDate" = #{samplingDate}, "OvenNumber" = #{ovenNumber}, "Notes" = #{notes}, "FarmerName" = #{farmerName}, "SoilSamplingTime"=#{soilSamplingTime}, "Classification" = r."Classification" FROM public."SoilClassificationRules" r WHERE s."SoilDataID" = #{soilDataID} AND r."SoilAttribute" = #{soilAttribute}::soil_parameters AND #{value} >= r."MinValue" AND #{value} < r."MaxValue"
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM public."SoilDatas" WHERE "IsDelete" = true AND "DeletedAt" IS NOT NULL AND "DeletedAt" < #{cutoff}
mapper.select:
SELECT
s."Value" s."SamplingDate" s."Classification" s."SoilAttribute"
s."Value"
FROM public."SoilDatas" s JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = s."MonitoringPointID"
s."IsDelete" = false
AND mp."CountyDistrict" = #{countyDistrict}
ORDER BY s."SoilDataID" ASC

SELECT
s."Value" s."SamplingDate" s."Classification" s."SoilAttribute"
s."Value"
FROM public."SoilDatas" s JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = s."MonitoringPointID"
s."IsDelete" = false
ORDER BY s."SoilDataID" ASC
